prompt: Photorealistic summer night beach scene viewed from the shore, wide cinematic panorama, 2:1 aspect ratio. Deep indigo and navy starry night sky filling the upper ~60%, thousands of stars with a soft Milky Way band and a bright full moon. Calm dark ocean in the lower ~40% with a long shimmering silver moonlight reflection across gentle ripples. Horizon line about 60% down from the top, with faint warm coastal city lights glowing softly along it. Subtle wispy clouds near the horizon. No people, no text, no watermark. Realistic long-exposure night photography, high detail, atmospheric, serene, clean.
